common_failures.feedback: Name both prerequisite roles before attempting the synthesis.

partial_credit_rules: Names both prerequisites but does not explain their combination gets partial credit.

common_failures.signal: Describes a list of steps without the synthesis relation
common_failures.feedback: State how the prerequisite pieces combine into a new move.

partial_credit_rules: States the synthesis but weakly maps prerequisite roles gets partial credit.

common_failures.signal: Repairs the local step but not the synthesis
common_failures.feedback: Repair the reasoning by reconnecting both prerequisites.

partial_credit_rules: Identifies the missing prerequisite without repairing the synthesis gets partial credit.

common_failures.signal: Cannot distinguish SK-002 alone from SK-003
common_failures.feedback: Separate the condition that requires synthesis from the condition that does not.

partial_credit_rules: Gives two cases without a boundary reason gets partial credit.

common_failures.signal: Applies the pattern without explaining prerequisite roles
common_failures.feedback: Tie each part of the scenario response back to the prerequisite it uses.

partial_credit_rules: Applies SK-003 but omits a limitation gets partial credit.
